title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not responding.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city even after updating the address in profile settings.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not yet received the amount in their account.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA verification codes on their registered mobile number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile image but receives an upload failed error.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Issue
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive the confirmation email despite successful payment.

title: Account Locked After Multiple Attempts
description: Customer account automatically locked after multiple failed login attempts.

title: Delay in OTP Delivery
description: Customer reports OTP messages arriving after several minutes causing login failures.

title: Unable to Change Password
description: Customer receives an error when trying to update their account password.

title: Dashboard Data Not Loading
description: Customer dashboard remains blank after login and shows loading spinner indefinitely.

title: Unable to Update Payment Method
description: Customer cannot update credit card information in the billing settings.
